sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../utils/api'; const trustPoints = [ 'Choose your charity at signup', 'Track scores and unlock reward draws', 'Verify winnings with admin-reviewed proof', ]; const experienceSteps = [ { title: 'Start with a cause', description: 'Every player chooses a charity first, then decides how much of their subscription should support it.', }, { title: 'Play with purpose', description: 'Stableford scores power eligibility, draws, and prize progress without turning the experience into a golf cliché.', }, { title: 'Win transparently', description: 'Published results, proof submission, admin review, and payout status keep every reward visible.', }, ]; const impactSignals = [ { label: 'Charity-first signup', value: '10%+' }, { label: 'Reward tiers', value: '3' }, { label: 'Draw modes', value: '2' }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const [featuredCharities, setFeaturedCharities] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { api.get('/charities?featured=true') .then((response) => setFeaturedCharities(response.data.charities || [])) .catch(() => setFeaturedCharities([])); }, []); return (
Golf Charity
Impact-led prize platform
Sign In Subscribe Now
Charitable impact comes first

A reward platform that starts with generosity, not sport.

Subscribe, choose a charity, log verified scores, enter transparent draws, and follow every rupee from contribution to payout.

Start Supporting a Charity View Subscription Plans
{impactSignals.map((signal) => (
{signal.value}
{signal.label}
))}
How the platform works
Subscribe flow
{trustPoints.map((point, index) => (
{index + 1}
{point}
))}
Conversion goal
Make the subscribe decision clear within the first screen.
The platform explains what users do, how they win, how charity impact is created, and what to click next.
Experience design

A modern interface shaped around trust and impact.

The experience avoids golf clichés and instead focuses on charity choice, transparent rewards, and lightweight motion.

{experienceSteps.map((step, index) => (
Step {index + 1}

{step.title}

{step.description}

))}
{featuredCharities.length > 0 && (
Featured charities

Spotlight causes currently highlighted across the platform.

Choose one at signup
{featuredCharities.slice(0, 3).map((charity, index) => (
Spotlight {charity.category || 'General'}

{charity.name}

{charity.description}

))}
)}
Prominent CTA

Subscribe to turn competition into visible charitable impact.

Join with a monthly or yearly plan, select your charity immediately, and follow your contribution and winnings in one dashboard.

Subscribe Today Create Account
Golf Charity

Impact-led design for charity-first reward experiences.

); }
